Limitations
===========

Limitations:
- not production
- no live search
- no live source probes
- /api/v1 reserved only, not live
- live probe gateway policy only; no probes implemented
- Google manual-baseline only
- no scraping
- no executable downloads or mirrors
- no snapshots yet
- no relay or native-client runtime behavior
- public JSON remains pre-alpha stable_draft, not a production API

route_count_summarized: 89
build_source: generated_public_data_summaries_v0
